assertions.title: Command enters interactive planning mode with prompts

steps.expected: Interactive planning mode displays goal prompt and suggests feature breakdown
steps.observed: Test passed - enters interactive mode with prompts for goal input

steps.expected: Command accepts goal from input parameter and proceeds to modification prompt
steps.observed: Test passed - accepts goal from input parameter

evidence.testOutput: tests/unit/usecases/plan-mission.usecase.test.ts passes with 'enters interactive mode with prompts' and 'accepts goal from input parameter' tests
evidence.consoleOutput: Interactive prompts displayed: '📋 Planning mission:', '🎯 Goal:', 'Suggested feature breakdown:'

assertions.title: User can accept generated plan, which updates features.json

steps.expected: Plan acceptance writes features to storage (features.json)
steps.observed: Test passed - 4 features created with correct IDs, descriptions, skillNames, and pending status

steps.expected: Features stored with missionId, description, skillName, status='pending'
steps.observed: All features correctly persisted with missionId reference and pending status

evidence.testOutput: Unit test 'VAL-M2-PLAN-002: plan acceptance writes features to storage' passes
evidence.featuresCreated: 4 features generated per plan (backend-worker, cli-worker, frontend-worker skills)

assertions.title: User can reject plan without creating features

steps.expected: Plan rejection leaves files unchanged, no features created
steps.observed: Test passed - features array empty after rejection, no features.json created

evidence.testOutput: Unit test 'VAL-M2-PLAN-003: plan rejection leaves files unchanged' passes
evidence.consoleOutput: '❌ Plan rejected. No features created.' message displayed

assertions.title: User can edit plan items before acceptance

steps.expected: Allows editing feature descriptions, skills, preconditions, expected behavior
steps.observed: Test passed - modification workflow allows editing all feature properties
Features with 'Modified' in description were correctly stored

steps.expected: Can add new features during modification workflow
steps.observed: Custom Feature added and persisted correctly

evidence.testOutput: Unit test 'VAL-M2-PLAN-004: modification workflow allows editing features' passes
evidence.consoleOutput: '📝 Modifying features' prompt displayed, supports editing description, skill, preconditions, expected behavior

summary: All 4 assertions passed (VAL-M2-PLAN-001 through VAL-M2-PLAN-004). The maestro mission plan command correctly implements interactive planning with goal input, feature suggestion, modification workflow, plan acceptance/rejection, and proper persistence to features.json.
